title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.

title: Hot Wheels Originals Series (2002)
summary:
200px|right
In 2002, Hot Wheels released a premium series of 12 original Hot Wheels designs. This series was exclusive to Target. Some card backs list Hyper Mite & Tow Jam as a part of this set, but neither were released.

title: Hot Wheels Garage (2010)
summary: Released in 2010, the Hot Wheels Garage succeeded the 2009 Larry's Garage line after Larry Wood retired from Mattel in 2009. Larry still had his own cars in the line in 2010, but was joined that year by fellow designer Phil Riehlman and graphics guru Wayne Scott. The 2010 series had eight new castings.

title: Hot Wheels XL
summary: 200px|rightHot Wheels XL is a 1:43 scale series of Hot Wheels; in essence the castings in this series are scaled up versions of mainline castings, carrying over their decos and often their wheels. This series was developed by Charlie Angulo.

title: B Engineering
summary: Borel Engineering is the company behind the super-exclusive Edonis supercar, based on the Bugatti EB110. Thanks to several engine modifications, it has higher performance than the vehicle on which it is based.The first model, presented in 2001, was called Edonis, based on the Bugatti EB110 Super Sport, but had been extensively revised....
